signals.headline: Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts & Unified Treasury | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts & Unified Treasury | YES | MED**  
Ripple announced the launch of Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury within Ripple Treasury, embedding native XRP and RLUSD balances into treasury management alongside cash for real-time valuation.[2]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M (Week Ending Apr 16) | YES | HIGH**  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs recorded $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16, the largest single-week inflow in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million, signaling strong institutional demand amid XRP's 12.5% surge from April lows.[1]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Vote Imminent (Week of Apr 27) | NO | LOW**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Vote Imminent (Week of Apr 27) | NO | LOW**  
Senate Banking Committee faces pressure from banks on stablecoin yields, potentially delaying CLARITY Act markup from week of April 27 to early May; Binance Square notes shifting Polymarket odds as legal risks ease.[5][6] No confirmed vote or passage yet.[6]

signals.headline: Ripple XRPL Quantum Resistance Roadmap to 2028 | NO | MED**
signals.raw:
Ripple XRPL Quantum Resistance Roadmap to 2028 | NO | MED**  
Ripple unveiled a roadmap to prepare XRP Ledger for post-quantum cryptography by 2028 amid quantum computing threats to blockchain security.[4][5] This is a forward-looking plan, not an immediate resolution.[5]
